parameters.jsonHeaders:
={
  "Content-Type": "application/json",
  "x-snbps-vendor": "COROS",
  "x-snbps-module": "{{ $('匹配sn前三位是否符合工单选择的机型').item.json.mapped_key }}",  
  "x-snbps-platformId": "2002",
  "x-snbps-timestamp": "{{ Date.now() }}"  
}

workflowId.cachedResultName: 1.Mes重构 — 工序查询通用接口

nodes.name: 判断插入数据是否成功
判断插入数据是否成功1

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    md.machine_data_id,
    md.retroid_id,
    md.procedure_detail_id,
    md.history_procedure_id,
    md.user_id,
    md.machine_id,
    md.data,
    pm.product_model_name
FROM 
    mes_test.machine_data md
JOIN 
    mes_test.retroid r ON md.retroid_id = r.retroid_id::VARCHAR  
JOIN 
    mes_test.joborder jo ON r.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN 
    mes_test.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN 
    mes_test.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
where
md.machine_data_id = {{ $json.machine_data_id}}

nodes.name: 判断插入数据是否成功2

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    r.retroid_id,
    r.joborder_id,
    r.retroid_generate_id,
    r.status,
    r.retroid
FROM mes_test.retroid r
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.body.sn}}'
select * from mes_test.cplc c where c.status = '3' and c.sn ='{{ $json.body.sn }}'

SELECT 
    r.retroid_id,
    r.joborder_id,
    r.retroid_generate_id,
    r.status,
    r.retroid
FROM mes_test.retroid r
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.data.sn }}'
select * from mes_test.cplc c where c.status = '3' and c.sn ='{{ $json.retroid }}'

select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes_test.procedure_detail pd where pd.procedure_name 
in('SN与UUID绑定')

select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id = {{ $json.previousProcedure.procedure_detail_id }}
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroidId }}'
order by md.createtime DESC
limit 1

nodes.name: 查询上一道工序是否完成

parameters.query:
WITH latest_history AS (
    -- 已选择最新的记录并展开数组
    SELECT json_array_elements_text(procedure_detail_id->'procedure_detail_id')::int AS detail_id
    FROM mes_test.history_procedure_list
    WHERE history_procedure_list_id = (
        -- 获取最新记录的 id
        SELECT history_procedure_list_id
        FROM mes_test.history_procedure_list
        WHERE procedure_list_id = '{{ $json.procedure_list_id }}' 
              AND status = 1
        ORDER BY createtime DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
-- 使用 DISTINCT ON 获取每个 detail_id 的最新记录
SELECT DISTINCT ON (hpd.procedure_detail_id) hpd.*
FROM mes_test.history_procedure_detail hpd
WHERE hpd.procedure_detail_id IN (
    SELECT detail_id FROM latest_history
)
AND hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2
ORDER BY hpd.procedure_detail_id, hpd.createtime DESC;

SELECT 
       r.retroid_id,
       jo.joborder_number,
       jo.joborder_id,
       pm.product_model_name,
       pi.product_code,
       jo.procedure_list_id
FROM mes_test.retroid r
JOIN mes_test.retroid_generate rg ON r.retroid_generate_id = rg.retroid_generate_id
JOIN mes_test.joborder jo ON rg.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN mes_test.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN mes_test.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.sn }}';  -- 替换成你要查询的 retroid

select * from mes_test.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in({{ $json.procedure_detail_id }},62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->>'bind_id'='{{ $json.data.bind_id }}' or md.data ->'data_old'->>'unbind_id'='{{ $json.data.bind_id }}' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

select * from mes_test.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id = {{ $json.previousProcedure.procedure_detail_id }}
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroidId }}'
order by md.createtime DESC
limit 1

nodes.name: 查询上一道工序是否完成1

parameters.query:
WITH latest_history AS (
    -- 已选择最新的记录并展开数组
    SELECT json_array_elements_text(procedure_detail_id->'procedure_detail_id')::int AS detail_id
    FROM mes_test.history_procedure_list
    WHERE history_procedure_list_id = (
        -- 获取最新记录的 id
        SELECT history_procedure_list_id
        FROM mes_test.history_procedure_list
        WHERE procedure_list_id = '{{ $json.procedure_list_id }}' 
              AND status = 1
        ORDER BY createtime DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
-- 使用 DISTINCT ON 获取每个 detail_id 的最新记录
SELECT DISTINCT ON (hpd.procedure_detail_id) hpd.*
FROM mes_test.history_procedure_detail hpd
WHERE hpd.procedure_detail_id IN (
    SELECT detail_id FROM latest_history
)
AND hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2
ORDER BY hpd.procedure_detail_id, hpd.createtime DESC;

SELECT 
       r.retroid_id,
       jo.joborder_number,
       jo.joborder_id,
       pm.product_model_name,
       pi.product_code,
       jo.procedure_list_id
FROM mes_test.retroid r
JOIN mes_test.retroid_generate rg ON r.retroid_generate_id = rg.retroid_generate_id
JOIN mes_test.joborder jo ON rg.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN mes_test.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN mes_test.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.data.sn }}';  -- 替换成你要查询的 retroid

select * from mes_test.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in({{ $json.procedure_detail_id }},62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->>'bind_id'='{{ $json.data.bind_id }}' or md.data ->'data_old'->>'unbind_id'='{{ $json.data.bind_id }}' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1
